title: Audit Trail
description: Immutable, hash-chained audit trail viewer for all platform actions across all services. Append-only — no delete, no update. Operator question: 'What actions have been taken, by whom, and is the audit chain intact?' No state-changing actions — read-only lens on the audit event stream. Chain verification detects tampering. Access to this surface is itself audit-logged. Audit data does not contain PHI (control-plane services do not handle PHI). No VistA equivalent — platform-native governance surface.

dataSources.description: Immutable hash-chained audit event stream from all platform service domains.
